rationale: The cited paper appears as a single, grouped reference in the theory section to support a broad statement that consumers may willfully ignore information and manage cognitions to protect self-image. In the citing paper, this serves as general background for motivated cognition rather than a paper-specific building block. There is no direct reuse of Ehrich and Irwin's design, measures, or findings in hypothesis tests, and no extended discussion of that study's specific contribution.
